title: Resilience Roofing
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Eric Jeoun","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIqmizz0JxWatwWuvutsA29a09bil_0ht_HwGO5TiT0K1oezg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My parents wanted to repair the gutters and roof of their home in Coquitlam. After a thorough review, I found Resilience Roofing—and after all the work was done, it’s no surprise they have 5 stars!

Hossein came to give my parents an estimate and also followed up with me since their English is limited. He was very clear about what needed to be done and made an amazing first impression.

My parents told me the team was exceptional. They went above and beyond. Our roof was already 10–15 years old, and when we asked when it would need to be replaced, Hossein said it still had a good 5–10 years left.

We had extensive work done on the gutters and also had the skylight replaced. When the time comes to replace the roof, we will definitely be calling Resilience Roofing again.

Thank you so much for the great work—you guys are the best!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDAa59MRpE17CVCm3gd4kP6&fid=0x0:0xa7d64a2701bde9e"],"When":"2025-7-19"},{"Name":"Farham K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJQWSz5AD80ua5CRUOSTL0kcriPlfe3YE47zD1Zu-GDyhtYEQ0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a phenomenal experience with Hossein and his team. They are highly knowledgeable, experienced, and professional, making them very easy to work with. Our project was an emergency, and rather than offering a temporary fix, they provided a thoughtful long-term solution. I would strongly recommend them to anyone seeking reliable and professional roofing services.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Glenn Bailey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUWndFCIwfeV3RzQyUjP2WgHtV4U0_hrjZ8FgFIVjCkFvIp3PQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hossein and the rest of the Team were all great. They are hard workers, did a excellent job, and they know what they are experts.  The price service and workmanship were all outstanding and I would not hesitate recomending them to anyone.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Simon Sukstorf","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIY12Mw055Q5L-Cyyz9lTkhh_mNerBgaKncp-TzZg2OUJXNSg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had an outstanding experience with Resilience Roofing! The owner was an absolute pleasure to work with—professional, honest, and responsive throughout the entire process. The crew arrived on time, completed the job exactly when they said they would, and left our property spotless. Not a single nail or scrap left behind.

The quality of the workmanship was excellent, and the price was more than fair—great value for the level of service and attention to detail we received. It’s rare to find a contractor who delivers on every promise, but this team did just that.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sandeep Lall","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLqnd2juZO-5dGAaoxjGaM6higxjWTXq_WJ2pdmRsYxmOrWOA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Was noticing some soft spots on the roof and flashing work that needed attention. Called Resilience Roofing and met with Hossein the owner of the company. He came by the house the next day and checked the roof, the attic and vents. Was very thorough with everything. Was very knowledgeable and professional with everything from answering questions and whats needs to get replaced.
Him and his team came by next week and did the work. They went above and beyond made sure everything was replaced and told me step by step whats he will be doing .
Awesome dude . Will recommend him for any new work or getting repairs done for your roof .","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Doug Steinbach","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKaFS-tMrAFMCFe5nZ3-kpCeCfKDuLt2PxuG8Mvt5m8GB6n8Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Housein,  Freddy and all the crew did an amazing job replacing our roof in North Burnaby. Great attention to all the details.  Advised and remedied all the issues we had on our previous 25 year old roof.  His pricing is fair and I would highly recommend them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Paul A.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLmDUyELTDQp7BH4sk3hCVOYz4kSqEjVtCLV7dveReoqKjzBQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I called Resilience Roofing to come check the disintegrated flashing I noticed on my shop roof. He actually returned my call within 20 minutes and showed up that afternoon as promised. Hussein is a respectful, hard working young man that presented me with my options and gave his recommendation. He quickly replaced the old flashing and even offered to check my house roof while he was here. He took pictures of exposed nails and failed caulking and sealed everything for me at no extra charge. Amazing. His prices were very reasonable and I will certainly be calling him to replace my roof when the time comes. He also made a point of cleaning up all the debris leaving no sign of being here (besides the new vent flashing!) I'm very pleased to highly recommend Resilience Roofing (Hussein)

Paul","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ash Poursaba","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWZSwRnB3mnlrBUsWuO_5873qPoNWiGabyROLxPqdrW_bYHbV6Y=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Can't say enough good things about Hossein and his team, they repaired a leaking roof for us and they were fast, the job was done right and they were very fair. Would certainly recommend them.","Images":null,"When":""}]

What impressed me most wasn’t just the flawless work, but their customer service. Mohsen and his partner were incredibly easy to talk to, patient in explaining every detail, and honest in guiding me through the process. You could feel their integrity in every word and action.

I'm pleased to say that our family is pleased to also report this company does great work and really took the stress out of the Job. Moreover the workers went out of their way not only fixing potential future issues but also put in extra overtime hours to make sure to avoid upcoming rain... and all at no extra cost. In today's day and age where it's rare to find people that care about their clients, these guy do.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"ashok makkar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK9BXKUw9tD65GQ-v51x6YU5NBPs4llkukep-d-X6V1sO6Y6g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"They don''t give free estimates. This is very bad experience. A tree had fallen on our roof from neighbours property. I called service master. The personal came and I asked him how this works. I asked about charges and the process. He said he would not charge for the assessment and he get a roofer to look at once the tree has been removed and there will be no charges unless I chose to go with quote for the repair s if there is damage. He was supposed to come back next with ladder but he got busy at another job. He gave a # for a tree removal service which was too much so I found another tree removal service. Once the tree was removed, I asked  Service Master about the Roofer and he said he already informed Jeff from Mountain west roofing. He gave his #. Service Master never mentioned any charge and I was told by ***** from ServiceMaster, there is no charge checking only the repair are needed and If chose to go with quote. Jeff send 2 young boys who took 2 pictures of the roof and said that was fuel spilled by the tree removal service so they would have to come back. They never came back. Service Master sent the report to  that stated there are no damages on the roof. Again nothing was mentioned regarding the charges for the inspection. Now I feel being ripped off by this company. He said the charges are $577. and he is not sending the invoice through proper channel. I did not agree to these charges verbally or any other shape or form. This is not how a business should run. Even when you go to a grocery store,  a small candy has a price written in bold letter so the consumer is informed. I questioning the intention and integrity of company.  They seem like dishonest people.","Images":null,"When":""}]
